[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00001010 2
1 10110011 5
2 10000000 1
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 01110110 5

01 10 11111110 7
12 21 11111111 a
23 32 10111111 7
34 43 10111110 6
45 54 00101111 5
56 65 11111011 7
67 76 11110011 6
70 07 11110110 6

02 20 11111111 a
13 31 11011010 5
24 42 10111111 7
35 53 10011011 5
46 64 11110111 7
57 75 10001011 4
60 06 11110111 7
71 17 11011010 5

14 41 11111110 7
25 52 10111111 7
36 63 11111011 7
47 74 10100110 4
50 05 01111111 7
61 16 11111011 7
72 27 10111111 7

04 40 01110110 5 match 7
15 51 11011011 6
26 62 11111111 a
37 73 10011010 4
